creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213779
py-django-star-ratings-0.9.1.patch

Hi,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-django-star-ratings to 0.9.1 and assigns it to Django 2.2 (current LTS release) because Django 1.11 is End-of-Life.

The patch also assigns the required dependencies to Django 2.2 and marks the repo-copied www/py-dj22-* variants as DEPRECATED.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
